case_filter: 32-case curated subset covering all major action surfaces (full 76-case bench would have required ~4h budget)
failure_mode: llm_chose_reply (27/32 cases — the 0_6b test-SFT defaults to REPLY for every tool-action prompt; only the 5 chat/negative cases pass, where REPLY is correct)
notes: The test-SFT is an 8k-slice / 1-epoch SFT of Qwen3-0.6B on Eliza-1 conversational data — it was NOT trained on the planner/PLAN_ACTIONS tool-call surface
12 of the 32 cases also hit prompt-size overflow (>32k tokens) because the runtime composes large memory+actions catalogs into the planner prompt
Curated 32-case filter biased toward standard cases across all tags; 0.0% on every non-chat tag is consistent with the model never producing a tool_call
